title: Abacus Range 35 Pack Paper Plates – 7 Inch / 18cm White Plates for Parties, BBQs, Catering, Events & Home Use
features: 𝟑𝟓 𝐗 𝟕-𝐈𝐍𝐂𝐇 𝐏𝐀𝐏𝐄𝐑 𝐏𝐋𝐀𝐓𝐄𝐒 – Bulk pack includes 35 white round paper plates measuring approx. 18cm (7”) diameter – ideal for home, parties, events, or catering.
𝐃𝐔𝐑𝐀𝐁𝐋𝐄 𝟏𝟕𝟎𝐆𝐒𝐌 𝐂𝐎𝐍𝐒𝐓𝐑𝐔𝐂𝐓𝐈𝐎𝐍 – Made from high-quality 170gsm white paper for strength and reliability; sturdy enough for serving hot or cold food.
𝐏𝐄𝐑𝐅𝐄𝐂𝐓 𝐅𝐎𝐑 𝐏𝐀𝐑𝐓𝐈𝐄𝐒, 𝐁𝐁𝐐𝐒 & 𝐄𝐕𝐄𝐍𝐓𝐒 – Great option for birthdays, weddings, picnics, office parties, outdoor events, and more.
𝐈𝐃𝐄𝐀𝐋 𝐅𝐎𝐑 𝐄𝐕𝐄𝐑𝐘𝐃𝐀𝐘 𝐔𝐒𝐄 – Lightweight yet strong plates, perfect for convenient dining, catering, or kids’ meals.
𝐑𝐄𝐂𝐘𝐂𝐋𝐀𝐁𝐋𝐄 & 𝐄𝐂𝐎-𝐅𝐑𝐈𝐄𝐍𝐃𝐋𝐘 – Made with recyclable paper material to support a cleaner and more sustainable environment.
description: Upgrade your tableware for parties, events, or everyday meals with Abacus Range 7-Inch Paper Plates (35 Pack) – a practical and eco-conscious solution for effortless serving and cleanup. Each white paper plate measures approximately 18cm (7 inches) and is crafted from 170gsm thick paper, offering excellent sturdiness for holding snacks, main dishes, or desserts. Whether you're hosting a BBQ, throwing a birthday party, or organising a corporate event, these plates are a reliable choice that saves time on washing up. Suitable for hot or cold foods, they’re ideal for home use, picnics, food stalls, or kids’ parties. Made from recyclable materials, these plates provide a sustainable alternative to conventional tableware. Make your next event stress-free and tidy with these high-quality paper party plates – durable, versatile, and always ready to serve.
